governing_directives: CHECKLIST E (REPRESENTATION_MIX hard-required at intake + NO-PEOPLE default)

files_edited.checkpoint: v2.0 -- Added SOP 9.0 PRE-PRESENTATION HARD-REQUIRED CAPTURE (six mandatory fields: REPRESENTATION_MIX with percentages, AUDIENCE-COMPOSITION NOTE, GROUNDED-CONTENT, VISUAL_MIX, DARK_OK default false, HOOK SEED); NO-PEOPLE + operator-flag rule for uncaptured representation; GROUNDED-CONTENT non-skippable; updated KPIs, Tools, Quality Gates, Handoffs, Anti-Patterns, Common Mistakes, Update Triggers, and Question Bank to enforce hard-required pre-presentation capture. SOP 9.0 runs before mode offer and is MANDATORY. All 19 sections kept. Zero em dashes.

v2.0 -- Mirror regenerated to match updated Section 9 of the role file verbatim. Includes new SOP 9.0, updated SOP 9.1 prerequisite and failure-mode, updated SOP 9.3 mandatory-variable checklist, updated SOP 9.4 prerequisite.

diu_twin: n/a -- no ROLE-- or SOP-- byte-identical twin exists for brainstorming-buddy-presentations
notes: All six hard-required pre-presentation fields (REPRESENTATION_MIX with percentages, AUDIENCE-COMPOSITION NOTE, GROUNDED-CONTENT, VISUAL_MIX, DARK_OK, HOOK SEED) are now enforced in SOP 9.0 as a mandatory gate before mode offer. NO-PEOPLE rule implemented: if REPRESENTATION_MIX is not captured, representation_uncaptured: true is set and the operator is flagged -- a racial or gender default is NEVER invented. GROUNDED-CONTENT is the client's specific book/message/offer/methodology; if absent at lock, grounded_content_provisional is set and handoff is blocked until resolved. The role file version bumped to 2.0. All 19 sections present. Zero em dashes confirmed by grep.
